name: Need for operationalised thresholds with domain calibration
description: Participants expressed a need for concrete, numeric quality thresholds but emphasised that generic thresholds are insufficient — domain-specific calibration is necessary, particularly in high-risk sectors.
key_evidence: Domain threshold divergence: medical participants require ≥99% factual precision vs 85% generic default (INT-02, INT-08, INT-14)
No industry baseline reference: teams cannot contextualise their metric values (INT-04, INT-06, INT-10)
Threshold instability: regulatory change (EU AI Act) triggered emergency threshold reviews (INT-07, INT-13)
significance_for_qalis: Directly motivates QALIS threshold calibration methodology (Section 3.3). Domain overrides in configs/metrics_thresholds.yaml.
representative_quotes: [Anonymised quote from a participant whose excerpt was coded C02]
